locations.name: Sunken Gardens
locations.clue: A 100-year-old botanical garden, one of St. Pete's oldest roadside attractions.

locations.name: The Don CeSar
locations.clue: The 'Pink Palace' — a historic 1928 resort hotel on the Gulf beach.

locations.name: Vinoy Park
locations.clue: A downtown waterfront park that hosts festivals and concerts.

locations.name: St. Pete Pier
locations.clue: The modern 26-acre pier district reaching into Tampa Bay, opened 2020.

locations.name: The Dalí Museum
locations.clue: Home to the largest Salvador Dalí collection outside Europe, under a glass 'enigma'.
